venue: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems

section_map.heading: IV. G AME ENGINE BASED SIMULATION EXPERIMENTS
section_map.zh: 检验方法是否真的改善效率、安全或能耗；要关注基准是否公平。
section_map.en: Tests efficiency, safety, or energy claims; inspect whether baselines are fair.

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Eco-driving + hybrid RL”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Eco-driving + hybrid RL. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Signalized setting and policy-level action output differ from a scheduler-to-smoother architecture.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 在信号灯、V2I 信息和混合交通干扰下，如何通过混合规则-学习策略降低能耗和时间损失？
overview.core_question_en: How can a hybrid rule-learning eco-driving policy reduce energy and travel time under SPaT and mixed-traffic constraints?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Combines a rule-based driving manager, V2I/vision features, and RL to generate longitudinal and lateral eco-driving actions.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Mixed-traffic policy includes rule-based safety management around surrounding vehicles.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Targets energy and travel-time reduction by smoothing approach behavior at signalized intersections.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：强应用价值：规则管理器增强 RL 安全性，适合作为轨迹平滑器能耗目标的参考。

methodology.model_name: 能耗-效率-安全复合奖励 / Energy-efficiency-safety reward
symbols: 避免单纯省能导致低速拖行
对碰撞或近碰撞施加强惩罚
methodology.algorithm_zh: 系统用规则型驾驶管理器处理安全和交通规则，用强化学习在允许动作空间中选择纵向/横向生态驾驶动作；V2I 和视觉特征帮助策略预见信号相位与周围车辆。
methodology.algorithm_en: A rule-based driving manager constrains behavior, while RL chooses eco-driving actions using SPaT/V2I and perception features.
methodology.stability_zh: 规则层提高可控性和可解释性，但策略性能仍依赖训练分布与奖励权重。相比纯 RL，它更适合工程系统中的安全外壳。
methodology.stability_en: The rule layer improves interpretability and reduces unsafe exploration, making the hybrid policy more deployable than a purely learned controller.
assumptions: 可获得信号相位与配时 (SPaT) 或可靠 V2I 信息。
规则管理器覆盖主要危险场景。
能耗模型与仿真平台对真实车辆足够近似。

experiments.validation: Unity-based mixed-traffic intersection simulation; reports 12.70 percent energy reduction and 11.75 percent travel-time saving against a model-based eco-driving baseline.
experiments.baselines: 模型式生态驾驶、普通 RL、人工驾驶/IDM、固定速度或信号响应策略。
experiments.metrics: 能耗降低百分比、行程时间、停车次数、舒适性指标和碰撞/违规事件。
experiments.ablation: 需要分别去掉规则管理器、V2I 特征、视觉特征和横向动作，才能说明混合结构的真实贡献。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。
检查状态、动作、奖励、经验回放和安全惩罚是否闭环一致。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 信号化场景与无信号 AIM 调度问题不同。
Unity 仿真能否代表真实车辆能耗仍需校准。
奖励权重敏感，跨路口迁移可能不稳定。
extensions: 把能耗奖励移植到 JSSP smoother，作为低层轨迹成本。
用多目标 RL 生成 Pareto 前沿，而不是固定奖励权重。
在 SUMO/真实轨迹数据上校准能耗模型，提高可发表可信度。
critique.project_use: Supports the argument that stop-and-go reduction and energy-aware smoothing are important low-level objectives.

interactive.response_zh: 能耗权重越高，轨迹越平滑，但可能牺牲通行时间。
interactive.response_en: Higher energy weight smooths trajectories but can increase travel time.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
